title: Bogus protocols: test access to process & material info
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"c02ce","text":"The purpose of this protocol is to test accessing the material and process components and icons.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: In this step, I'll use the centrifugation component and icon. 37000 rcf, -20 °C, 2 minutes
In this step, I'll use the shaker component. 1800 rpm, -20 °C, 3 hours
In this substep, I'll use the incubation icon.
In this step, I'll use the pipetting icon.
In this substep, I'll use the wash icon.
In this substep, I'll use the mix icon.
